title: Verify all tracking events fire correctly during Trial Corner interactions
description: Test that all required analytics events are triggered with correct attributes

steps.description: 1. User views trial widget - check trial-corner-widget-viewed fires
2. User clicks widget - check trial-corner-widget-clicked fires
3. User views Trial Corner - check trial-corner-viewed fires
4. User views top content - check trial-corner-topcontent-viewed fires
5. User plays top content - check trial-corner-topcontent-played fires

expected_result: All events fire with correct attributes (variant type, content id, play type)
